title: Chuzume's Cute Villagers
description: For players who’ve had it with those vanilla villagers
body:
### Farewell to the big-nosed villagers
This resource pack keeps the vanilla feel as much as possible, while changing the appearance of villagers and their zombified forms from big-nosed, long-headed humans to more natural-looking humans with fluffy hair and slightly oversized hats.

### They are not noisy!
There will be no sound except when you receive damage or die, and those two sounds will be the same as the player's damage sound. It will be quiet even in a place full of villagers!

### Compatibility
I created this in Minecraft 1.21.5, but I've confirmed that it works in 1.20.4 as well.
I haven't tested it in earlier versions, but the folder structure doesn't seem to have changed, so it should work fine in 1.14 and later. When you load the resource pack, you should get a warning saying something like "This resource pack is too new," but you can ignore that and use it.
